runs.notes: Manual seed-add from Eriks. 17 candidates submitted; 15 verified and added; 1 skipped (grep.ai/benchmark — persistent 403, fails URL verification); ChatJimmy merged into Taalas entry (same vendor, ChatJimmy is the demo). Also expanded query_bank with 12 new queries to bias future runs toward similar tool categories: AI memory, search APIs for agents, deep-research benchmarks, coding-agent orchestrators, AI design skills, generative video / 3D, custom silicon inference, agent sandboxing.

User-directed run: take everything useful from @theAIsearch YouTube channel + find what others are talking about. Pulled channel RSS (channel_id UCIgnGlGkVRhd4qNFcEwLL4A); extracted recurring foundation-model and video-gen mentions (DeepSeek V4, Qwen 3.6, Gemma 4, Wan); rounded out with widely-discussed open-inference platforms (Groq, Together AI) and memory tools (Mem0, Letta). Also added youtube_channels section to sources.json with 5 channels (theAIsearch high-priority, Matt Wolfe high, AI Explained med, Wes Roth med, David Ondrej low). Created docs/daily-curator-package.md as the canonical Mon-Fri prompt for cowork sessions.
